risk_title: Conflict Impact on NRLAIS Operationalization in Tigray
risk_summary: The current conflict in Tigray region is constraining reporting on the operationalization status of NRLAIS in 10 woredas, affecting the ability to verify and monitor land administration system functionality in conflict-affected areas.
evidence_quote: This figure includes 10 woredas in Tigray region where the current conflict constrains reporting on current status of operationalization.
